title: Barclays Downgrades SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) to Underweight
text: Barclays Analyst Downgrade of SolarEdge Technologies. Analyst Downgrade: In January 2024, Barclays analyst Christine Cho downgraded SolarEdge Technologies from Equalweight to Underweight with a price target of 50.00 (from 74.00). Rationale: The downgrade cited concerns that it is too early for residential solar to recover, suggesting weakness in the residential solar market segment. The analyst's thesis indicated that residential solar demand remains under pressure, justifying the more negative outlook on the company. Price Target Implications: The revised price target of 50.00 represented a significant reduction from the previous 74.00 target, indicating Barclays' belief in downside risk to the stock. This downgrade was one of several negative analyst reactions to SEDG's challenges in 2024.
